title: Agent speech never collapsed in conversation viewer

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
conversation-viewer.tsx ~line 2417 applies CollapsibleText with maxLines={10} to ALL non-tool messages, including what agents say. For a 6,767-char hypothesis streamed by the analyzer agent, this shows only the first 10 lines.

Rule: agent speech (ASSISTANT role + MESSAGE messageType) must never be collapsed. Only tool call parameters and tool call results may be collapsed.

Fix: In the else-branch at ~line 2415-2419, check if message is agent speech before applying maxLines. In message-utils.tsx CollapsibleText, guard shouldTruncate so maxLines=undefined means never collapse.

Files: dashboard/components/ui/conversation-viewer.tsx ~2417, dashboard/components/ui/message-utils.tsx ~37.
